heroTitle: Connect patients to care faster with intelligent digital triage.
heroText: MediConnect helps healthcare teams assess symptoms quickly, prioritize risk with confidence, and route patients to the right level of care.
feature1Text: Each answer drives the next step dynamically.
feature2Text: Auto-scoring with red-flag detection for urgency.
feature3Text: Direct users to self-care, clinic, or emergency care.
step3Text: Risk level and next actions are generated.
clinicsText: Deploy triage forms in minutes and streamline intake with standardized digital assessments.
